evaluation_summary.actors: The extracted actors list is mostly complete and traceable to the documentation. One actor type mentioned in the documentation (BGT Foundation) was not explicitly extracted as a distinct actor but is mentioned in the context of governance review.
evaluation_summary.assets: The extracted assets list is comprehensive and well-supported by the documentation. All listed assets are explicitly mentioned or clearly implied as distinct entities within the system description.
evaluation_summary.components: The extracted components list is largely accurate and traceable. However, some components mentioned in the documentation, particularly specific smart contracts, were not extracted. The trust levels assigned are not explicitly defined in the documentation but are reasonable inferences.
evaluation_summary.data_flows: The extracted data flows capture many key interactions described in the documentation. However, some flows are missing, and the security properties assigned are inferences not explicitly stated in the text.
evaluation_summary.trust_boundaries: The extracted trust boundaries identify logical separations within the system based on the documentation. The boundaries are reasonable interpretations of the system architecture described.
evaluation_summary.behaviors: The extracted behaviors cover many user and system actions described. Some behaviors are missing, and the level of detail varies. The mapping of initiators and targets is generally correct based on the documentation.

findings.description: The 'BGT Foundation' is mentioned as reviewing RFRV proposals but is not included as a distinct actor.
Testnet user RFA allocations are mentioned in the airdrop section but not included as a distinct asset type.
Ecosystem NFTs are mentioned in the airdrop section but not included as a distinct asset type.
Collateral assets other than USDC and BYUSD (e.g., stgUSDC mentioned in FAQ) are not explicitly listed as assets, although the Honey Swap section mentions 'approved stables and assets'.
Specific EVM Execution Clients (Geth, Reth, Erigon, Nethermind, Besu) are mentioned as components but not extracted.
The BeraChef contract is mentioned in the context of Reward Vault whitelisting but is not extracted as a component.
The BlockRewardController contract is mentioned in Proof of Liquidity Updates but is not extracted as a component.
The Honey Paper is mentioned as a document but not extracted as a component (if considered documentation asset).
The Governance Forum (hub.forum.berachain.com) is mentioned as a platform for RFRV discussion but is not extracted as a component.
The Auto-Incentivizer is mentioned as a feature/component in PoL updates but is not extracted.
The Reward Vault Factory contract is mentioned in Vault Creation but is not extracted as a component.
Flow: Validator receives BGT block rewards from the network.
Flow: Validator receives gas fees/priority fees from the network.
Flow: User receives LP/Receipt token after providing liquidity.
Flow: User receives BGT rewards from the Reward Vault (claimable).
Flow: Validator receives incentive commission from the BGTIncentiveDistributor.
Flow: User receives BERA after burning BGT.
Flow: HoneyFactory transfers fee shares to the fee receiver.
Flow: FeeCollector auctions fees for WBERA.
Flow: Validator sets/queues incentive commission rate.
Flow: Governance proposal is submitted to the Governance Contract.
Flow: Guardian cancels a proposal via the Governance Contract.
Flow: Governance proposal is executed.
Flow: Validator node communicates with Execution Client (transactions, block template).
Flow: Execution Client communicates with Consensus Layer (block data, execution results).
Flow: Consensus Layer communicates with CometBFT (consensus messages).
Flow: Validator node communicates with Consensus Layer (block proposal, votes).
Flow: HoneyFactory interacts with Honey Vault (transfer collateral/shares).
Boundary between the Protocol/Project (Actor 3) and the Berachain Network (Component 1).
Boundary between the Incentive Token Manager (Actor 5) and the Berachain Network (Component 1).
Boundary between the Guardian (Actor 4) and the Governance Contract (Component 8).
Boundary between the BeraHub frontend (Component 6) and the Berachain Network (Component 1).
Boundary between the Reward Vault (Component 7) and the BGTIncentiveDistributor (Component 11).
Boundary between the FeeCollector (Component 10) and the BGTIncentiveDistributor (Component 11).
Boundary between the HoneyFactory (Component 9) and the Honey Vault (Component 17).
Validator receives BGT block rewards.
Validator receives gas fees/priority fees.
User receives LP/Receipt token.
User receives BGT rewards (claimable).
Validator receives incentive commission.
User receives BERA after burning BGT.
HoneyFactory transfers fee shares.
FeeCollector auctions fees.
Validator sets/queues incentive commission rate.
User submits RFRV form/post.
BGT Foundation/Guardians review RFRV proposals.
Governance proposal enters Pending state.
Governance proposal enters Active Voting state.
Governance proposal reaches Outcome (Succeeded/Defeated).
Governance proposal enters Timelock state.
Governance proposal is Executed.
Guardian cancels a proposal.
Incentive Token Manager sets Incentive Rate.
Incentive Token Manager increases Incentive Rate.
Incentive Token Manager sets lower Incentive Rate (when exhausted).
User contributes Incentive Token amount (to be applied by manager).
Validator node provides data to Execution Client.
Execution Client executes transactions.
BeaconKit manages consensus.
CometBFT provides consensus algorithm.
HoneyFactory transfers collateral to vault.
HoneyFactory receives shares from vault.
HoneyFactory transfers collateral/shares back to user.
Basket Mode activates.
User redeems for proportional share of collateral (Basket Mode).
User provides proportional amounts of collateral to mint (Basket Mode).
